captured: Sample campaign generated by Cortex Studio on Google Gemini (gemini-flash / gemini-3.5-flash). Replayed by the keyless demo.
brief: Launch a refill-signup campaign for Sai Energy LPG (Indane distributor, Coimbatore). Goal: more households booking cylinder refills via the app. Tone: trustworthy, local, safety-first.

events.message: plan built: research, strategy, copy, creative, localize
grounded research done (3 brand + 2 web sources)

package.brief: Launch a refill-signup campaign for Sai Energy LPG (Indane distributor, Coimbatore). Goal: more households booking cylinder refills via the app. Tone: trustworthy, local, safety-first.

findings.claim: Sai Energy System is a trusted, authorized Indane LPG distributor with over 25 years of local service in Coimbatore.
Safety and reliability are core brand priorities: correct handling, timely inspections, genuine cylinders, without implying competitors are unsafe.
The campaign should prioritize the convenience of app-based booking and doorstep delivery over price-centric messaging.
App-based cylinder booking adoption is rising in tier-2 Indian cities, making Coimbatore an ideal market for this campaign.
Combining safety messaging with a strong local presence increases conversion for essential services.

research.summary: Lead with the 25-year legacy of local trust and strict safety, and frame app-based booking plus doorstep delivery as the effortless, modern convenience, without competing on price.

segments: Busy dual-income households that value convenience
strategy.positioning: The trusted local Indane distributor for 25 years, now with one-tap app refills. Safety and reliability, made effortless.

copy.headline: Your trusted Indane refill, now just a tap away.
captions: Skip the queue. Book your Indane cylinder refill from Sai Energy in under a minute. 📲✨ #CoimbatoreSmartHome #IndaneGas #LPGRefill
No more waiting on hold. Genuine Indane cylinder deliveries with certified safety checks from Sai Energy. Tap, book, relax. Booked your refill this month? 👇 #SaiEnergyIndane #CoimbatoreSafe #EasyLPG
25 years of trusted local service in Coimbatore. Safe handling, genuine cylinders, doorstep delivery, your family's safety is our promise.
copy.email_subject: A safer, smarter way to book your gas refill
copy.email_body:
Hi there,

For over 25 years, Coimbatore families have trusted Sai Energy for safe, reliable Indane LPG. Now booking your refill is easier than ever, just open the app, tap once, and we handle the rest, with certified safety checks and doorstep delivery.

No phone queues. No uncertainty. Just genuine cylinders, handled safely, delivered on time.

Book your next refill in the app today.

- Team Sai Energy

creative.concept: Warm, safety-forward domestic scenes: a Coimbatore family kitchen, a genuine sealed Indane cylinder, a delivery agent doing a visible safety check, ending on a phone showing one-tap booking. Trust plus ease.
image_prompts: Warm Coimbatore home kitchen at golden hour, a mother booking an LPG refill on her phone, sealed genuine Indane cylinder beside her, safety-forward, photorealistic
Sai Energy delivery agent performing a visible cylinder safety check at a doorstep, friendly and professional, local Tamil neighbourhood, trust-building

localization.headline_ta: உங்கள் நம்பகமான இண்டேன் ரிபில், இப்போது ஒரே தட்டில்.
captions_ta: வரிசையில் காத்திருக்க வேண்டாம். சாய் எனர்ஜியிலிருந்து உண்மையான இண்டேன் சிலிண்டர், பாதுகாப்பு சோதனையுடன். தட்டுங்கள், புக் செய்யுங்கள், நிம்மதியாக இருங்கள்.
கோயம்புத்தூர் குடும்பங்கள் நம்பும் சேவை, 25 ஆண்டுகளாக. இந்த மாதம் உங்கள் refill புக் செய்தீர்களா? 📲
localization.note: Adapted (not literal) to natural Coimbatore Tamil; keeps the safety + convenience framing.
